transcriptText.title: Podcast transcript (text)
transcriptText.description: Full podcast transcript as plain text. Provide this OR podcastUrl (not both). Max 100,000 characters.

podcastUrl.title: Podcast episode URL
podcastUrl.description: URL of a podcast episode page with a transcript. The transcript will be fetched automatically. Provide this OR transcriptText.

episodeId.title: Episode ID (optional)
episodeId.description: Unique identifier for the episode (used for caching). Example: 'huberman-ep-301'. Defaults to a timestamp if not provided.

showName.title: Show name (optional)
showName.description: Name of the podcast show. Improves entity resolution accuracy.

categoryFilter.title: Category filter (optional)
categoryFilter.description: Limit results to specific product categories. Options: physical_goods, supplement, software, service, book, course, equipment. Leave empty for all categories.

minConfidence.title: Minimum confidence threshold (optional)
minConfidence.description: Filter out products below this confidence score (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.0 (return all).
